description: Grammy-nominated Nigerien Tuareg guitar hero Bombino, hailed by The New York Times as the "Sultan of Shred", continues to redefine desert blues and rock for a global audience. Over the years, Bombino has collaborated with acclaimed producers such as Dan Auerbach (The Black Keys) on Nomad and David Longstreth (Dirty Projectors) on Azel, earning praise from icons including Keith Richards, Stevie Wonder, Robert Plant, and Arcade Fire.
subtitle: Niger
title: Bombino Concert
